title: Quadlet - print warning when fail to parse
body:
#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
Yes

```release-note
Quadlet - print warnings when fail to parse exec or reload command
```

Fixes: #26542

comments.body: Uh, cirrus didn't trigger on this. This needs a force push.
@ygalblum looks like this needs another nudge.
